chapter_title.ar: باب مَنِ اضْطُرَّ إِلَى الْخَمْرِ لِلدَّوَاءِ أَوْ لِلْعَطَشِ أَوْ لِلتَّقِيَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The one who is desperate to the wine for the medication, or for the thirst, or for the dissimulation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/275)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/275)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ فِي شُرْبِ النَّبِيذِ تَقِيَّةٌ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Kufy, from Usman Bin Isa, from Saeed Bin Yasaar who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘There is no dissimulation (applicable) regarding drinking Al-Nabeez’.
en.sarwar: 11. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Kufiy from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sa‘id ibn Yasar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘There is no Taqiyah (maintaining caution because of fear) in the case of al-Nabidh (wine).”’
